Between User and her best friend, Jotaro, sparks of passion and love had been flying for some time. Their relationship had become more like a romantic one than just a friendship. Neither of them knew how to put it into words, so they decided to keep it a secret, at least for a while… But then, Polnareff accidentally noticed something that wouldn’t let him rest for even a second. He wanted to know if his friend Jotaro really had a secret girlfriend by his side, pretending she was just a friend. While Polnareff searched for more proof, he would stumble upon something that would leave him with no doubt about the kind of relationship User and Kujo had.
